title: lathyrus polymorphus var. hapemanii
intro: Lathyrus polymorphus var. hapemanii, also known as the hairy pea or hairy vetchling, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus polymorphus var. hapemanii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat a range of conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
